name: Morgan Sindall Group PLC
description: A UK construction and regeneration group operating through five divisions: Partnership Housing, Mixed Use Partnerships, Fit Out, Construction, and Infrastructure. Market leader in fit out, strong positions in partnership housing and mixed-use regeneration.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: UK construction & regeneration demand across partnership housing, fit out, infrastructure. Revenue £5,019m in FY2025 (+10%). Fit Out division market leader (£1,784m revenue). Secured order book £12.0bn plus £7.1bn preferred bidder.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin expanded to 4.5% in FY2025 (from 3.6% in FY2024). Fit Out margin 7.8%, Infrastructure 4.0%, Construction 3.2%. Medium-term targets: Fit Out £80-100m annual profit, Construction 3.0-3.5%, Infrastructure 3.75-4.25%.
assumptions.risks: Cyclical UK construction exposure, housing market headwinds (slow private sales recovery), Property Services turnaround (now integrated into Construction from 2026), building safety liabilities (£62.9m provisions), working capital volatility.
assumptions.catalyst: Government spending commitments (£39bn affordable homes over 10 years, defence, nuclear, infrastructure), record £19.1bn order book + preferred bidder, medium-term target upgrades for Infrastructure and Mixed Use Partnerships, 20% dividend growth.
assumptions.lastReportAnalysed: FY2025 Annual Report & Preliminary Results (year ended 31 Dec 2025)
